description.en: Adds hourly wages for workers with skill-based pricing and configurable rates.
description.de: FГјgt stГјndliche LГ¶hne fГјr Arbeiter mit fГӨhigkeitsbasierten Preisen und konfigurierbaren SГӨtzen hinzu.
description.fr: Ajoute des salaires horaires pour les ouvriers avec tarification basГ©e sur les compГ©tences et taux configurables.
description.pl: Dodaje godzinowe stawki dla pracownikГіw z cenami opartymi na umiejДҷtnoЕӣciach i konfigurowalnymi stawkami.
description.es: AГұade salarios por hora para trabajadores con precios basados en habilidades y tarifas configurables.
description.it: Aggiunge salari orari per operai con prezzi basati su abilitГ e tariffe configurabili.
description.cz: PЕҷidГЎvГЎ hodinovГ© mzdy pro pracovnГӯky s cenami zaloЕҫenГҪmi na dovednostech a konfigurovatelnГҪmi sazbami.
description.br: Adiciona salГЎrios por hora para trabalhadores com preГ§os baseados em habilidades e taxas configurГЎveis.
description.uk: Р”РҫРҙР°С” РҝРҫРіРҫРҙРёРҪРҪСғ РҫРҝР»Р°СӮСғ РҝСҖР°СҶС–РІРҪРёРәР°Рј Р· СҶС–РҪРҫСҺ РҪР° РҫСҒРҪРҫРІС– РҪР°РІРёСҮРҫРә СӮР° РҪР°СҒСӮСҖРҫСҺРІР°РҪРёРјРё СҒСӮР°РІРәР°РјРё.
description.ru: Р”РҫРұР°РІР»СҸРөСӮ РҝРҫСҮР°СҒРҫРІСғСҺ РҫРҝР»Р°СӮСғ СҖР°РұРҫСӮРҪРёРәР°Рј СҒ СҶРөРҪР°РјРё РҪР° РҫСҒРҪРҫРІРө РҪР°РІСӢРәРҫРІ Рё РҪР°СҒСӮСҖР°РёРІР°РөРјСӢРјРё СҒСӮР°РІРәР°РјРё.

text.name: wc_enabled_long
text.en: Enable or disable the worker costs mod
text.fr: Activer ou dГ©sactiver le module de coГ»ts des ouvriers
text.pl: WЕӮД…cz lub wyЕӮД…cz mod kosztГіw pracownikГіw
text.es: Activar o desactivar el mГіdulo de costos de trabajadores
text.it: Attiva o disattiva il modulo dei costi degli operai
text.cz: Povolit nebo zakГЎzat mod nГЎkladЕҜ na pracovnГӯky
text.br: Ativar ou desativar o mod de custos de trabalhadores
text.uk: РЈРІС–РјРәРҪСғСӮРё Р°РұРҫ РІРёРјРәРҪСғСӮРё РјРҫРҙ РІРёСӮСҖР°СӮ РҪР° РҝСҖР°СҶС–РІРҪРёРәС–РІ
text.ru: Р’РәР»СҺСҮРёСӮСҢ РёР»Рё РІСӢРәР»СҺСҮРёСӮСҢ РјРҫРҙ СҖР°СҒС…РҫРҙРҫРІ РҪР° СҖР°РұРҫСӮРҪРёРәРҫРІ
text.da: AktivГ©r eller deaktiver modвҖҷen for medarbejderomkostninger

text.name: wc_costmode_long
text.en: Choose cost calculation: hourly or per hectare
text.de: WГӨhlen Sie die Kostenberechnung: stГјndlich oder pro Hektar
text.fr: Choisissez le calcul des coГ»ts : horaire ou par hectare
text.pl: Wybierz obliczanie kosztГіw: godzinowe lub za hektar
text.es: Elegir cГЎlculo de costos: por hora o por hectГЎrea
text.it: Scegli calcolo costi: orario o per ettaro
text.cz: Vyberte vГҪpoДҚet nГЎkladЕҜ: hodinovГҪ nebo na hektar
text.br: Escolher cГЎlculo de custos: por hora ou por hectare
text.uk: Р’РёРұРөСҖС–СӮСҢ СҖРҫР·СҖР°С…СғРҪРҫРә РІРёСӮСҖР°СӮ: РҝРҫРіРҫРҙРёРҪРҪРҫ Р°РұРҫ Р·Р° РіРөРәСӮР°СҖ
text.ru: Р’СӢРұСҖР°СӮСҢ СҖР°СҒСҮРөСӮ СҖР°СҒС…РҫРҙРҫРІ: РҝРҫСҮР°СҒРҫРІРҫ РёР»Рё Р·Р° РіРөРәСӮР°СҖ
text.da: VГҰlg beregningsmetode for omkostninger: timebaseret eller pr. hektar

text.name: wc_difficulty_long
text.en: Set base wage rate: Low=$15/h, Medium=$25/h, High=$40/h
text.fr: DГ©finir le taux de salaire de base : Bas=15$/h, Moyen=25$/h, ГүlevГ©=40$/h
text.pl: Ustaw podstawowД… stawkДҷ: Niska=15$/h, Еҡrednia=25$/h, Wysoka=40$/h
text.es: Establecer tasa salarial base: Baja=15$/h, Media=25$/h, Alta=40$/h
text.it: Imposta tariffa base: Bassa=15$/h, Media=25$/h, Alta=40$/h
text.cz: Nastavit zГЎkladnГӯ sazbu: NГӯzkГЎ=15$/h, StЕҷednГӯ=25$/h, VysokГЎ=40$/h
text.br: Definir taxa salarial base: Baixa=15$/h, MГ©dia=25$/h, Alta=40$/h
text.uk: Р’СҒСӮР°РҪРҫРІРёСӮРё РұР°Р·РҫРІСғ СҒСӮР°РІРәСғ: РқРёР·СҢРәР°=15$/РіРҫРҙ, РЎРөСҖРөРҙРҪСҸ=25$/РіРҫРҙ, Р’РёСҒРҫРәР°=40$/РіРҫРҙ
text.ru: РЈСҒСӮР°РҪРҫРІРёСӮСҢ РұР°Р·РҫРІСғСҺ СҒСӮР°РІРәСғ: РқРёР·РәР°СҸ=15$/СҮ, РЎСҖРөРҙРҪСҸСҸ=25$/СҮ, Р’СӢСҒРҫРәР°СҸ=40$/СҮ

text.name: wc_notifications_long
text.fr: Activer/dГ©sactiver les notifications de paiement des salaires
text.es: Activar/desactivar notificaciones de pago de salarios
text.br: Ativar/desativar notificaГ§Гөes de pagamento de salГЎrios
text.uk: РЈРІС–РјРәРҪСғСӮРё/РІРёРјРәРҪСғСӮРё СҒРҝРҫРІС–СүРөРҪРҪСҸ РҝСҖРҫ РІРёРҝР»Р°СӮСғ Р·Р°СҖРҫРұС–СӮРҪРҫС— РҝР»Р°СӮРё
text.ru: Р’РәР»СҺСҮРёСӮСҢ/РІСӢРәР»СҺСҮРёСӮСҢ СғРІРөРҙРҫРјР»РөРҪРёСҸ Рҫ РІСӢРҝР»Р°СӮРө Р·Р°СҖР°РұРҫСӮРҪРҫР№ РҝР»Р°СӮСӢ

text.name: wc_customrate_long
text.en: Set custom wage rate (0 = use wage level setting)
text.fr: DГ©finir le taux de salaire personnalisГ© (0 = utiliser le niveau de salaire)
text.pl: Ustaw niestandardowД… stawkДҷ (0 = uЕјyj ustawienia poziomu pЕӮac)
text.es: Establecer tasa salarial personalizada (0 = usar configuraciГіn de nivel)
text.it: Imposta tariffa salariale personalizzata (0 = usa impostazione livello)
text.cz: Nastavit vlastnГӯ mzdovou sazbu (0 = pouЕҫГӯt nastavenГӯ ГәrovnДӣ)
text.br: Definir taxa salarial personalizada (0 = usar configuraГ§ГЈo de nГӯvel)
text.uk: Р’СҒСӮР°РҪРҫРІРёСӮРё РІР»Р°СҒРҪСғ СҒСӮР°РІРәСғ РҫРҝР»Р°СӮРё (0 = РІРёРәРҫСҖРёСҒСӮРҫРІСғРІР°СӮРё РҪР°Р»Р°СҲСӮСғРІР°РҪРҪСҸ СҖС–РІРҪСҸ)
text.ru: РЈСҒСӮР°РҪРҫРІРёСӮСҢ РҝРҫР»СҢР·РҫРІР°СӮРөР»СҢСҒРәСғСҺ СҒСӮР°РІРәСғ РҫРҝР»Р°СӮСӢ (0 = РёСҒРҝРҫР»СҢР·РҫРІР°СӮСҢ РҪР°СҒСӮСҖРҫР№РәСғ СғСҖРҫРІРҪСҸ)

text.name: wc_hint_open_manager
text.en: Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.de: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.fr: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.pl: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.es: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.it: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.cz: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.br: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.uk: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.ru: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.da: Tryk pГҘ AcceptГ©r for at ГҘbne den fulde styring

text.name: wc_about_payment_note
text.en: Payments run on real time вҖ” game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.de: Zahlungen laufen in Echtzeit вҖ” die Spielgeschwindigkeit hat keinen Einfluss auf die Abrechnung.
text.fr: Les paiements s'effectuent en temps rГ©el вҖ” la vitesse du jeu n'affecte pas la facturation.
text.es: Los pagos se ejecutan en tiempo real вҖ” la velocidad del juego no afecta la facturaciГіn.
text.pl: [EN] Payments run on real time вҖ” game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.it: [EN] Payments run on real time вҖ” game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.cz: [EN] Payments run on real time вҖ” game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.br: [EN] Payments run on real time вҖ” game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.uk: [EN] Payments run on real time вҖ” game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.ru: [EN] Payments run on real time вҖ” game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.da: Betalinger sker i realtid вҖ” spilhastigheden pГҘvirker ikke opkrГҰvningen. Fradrag foretages automatisk i baggrunden ved hvert interval.

text.name: wc_about_body
text.en:
Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.de: Realistische Arbeiterkosten ersetzt das Standard-Arbeiterlohnsystem durch ein Abrechnungsmodell auf Basis von Echtzeit.
text.fr: CoГ»ts RГ©alistes des Ouvriers remplace le systГЁme de salaire par dГ©faut par un modГЁle de facturation basГ© sur le temps rГ©el.
text.es: Costos Realistas de Trabajadores reemplaza el sistema de pago de trabajadores predeterminado con un modelo de facturaciГіn basado en tiempo real.
text.pl:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.it:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.cz:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.br:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.uk:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.ru:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.da:
Realistic Worker Costs erstatter standardlГёnssystemet for medarbejdere med en faktureringsmodel baseret pГҘ realtid.
Medarbejdere opkrГҰves efter en fast tidsplan uanset spillets hastighed. Hver aktiv AI-medarbejder koster penge ved hvert betalingsinterval.
TIMEBASERET TILSTAND En fast sats pr. medarbejder pr. time. Omkostningerne skalerer efter, hvor mange medarbejdere der er aktive, og hvor lГҰnge de arbejder.
PR. HEKTAR-TILSTAND Medarbejdere opkrГҰves baseret pГҘ det bearbejdede areal. Satsen pr. hektar skalerer med din indstilling for lГёnniveau.
LГҳNINDSTILLINGER Juster omkostningstilstand, lГёnniveau, og slГҘ notifikationer til eller fra i fanen LГёnindstillinger. Brug Nulstil for at gendanne standardindstillingerne.
MEDARBEJDERSTATISTIK Fanen Medarbejderstatistik viser en live oversigt over omkostninger pr. medarbejder for det aktuelle betalingsinterval.
Denne mod er kompatibel med multiplayer. Indstillinger gemmes pr. savegame.

text.name: wc_menu_description
text.en: Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.de: Гңberwachen Sie Ihre Arbeitskosten und den Abrechnungsstatus auf einen Blick.
text.fr: Surveillez vos coГ»ts de main-d'oeuvre d'un coup d'oeil. Ouvrez le Gestionnaire pour les statistiques en direct.
text.es: Supervise los costos de sus trabajadores de un vistazo. Abra el Administrador para estadГӯsticas en vivo.
text.pl: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.it: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.cz: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.br: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.uk: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.ru: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.da: FГҘ et hurtigt overblik over dine medarbejderomkostninger og betalingsstatus. Г…bn medarbejderstyringen for live statistik, detaljerede oversigter og fuld kontrol over indstillingerne

text.name: wc_help_body
text.en:
COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.de:
[EN] COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.fr:
[EN] COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.pl:
[EN] COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.es:
[EN] COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.it:
[EN] COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.cz:
[EN] COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.br:
[EN] COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.uk:
[EN] COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.ru:
[EN] COST MODE Hourly вҖ” pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare вҖ” pay based on area worked.
WAGE LEVEL Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 5 real-time minutes, independent of game speed. The rate preview on this page reflects the exact charge per billing interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.da:
OMKOSTNINGSTILSTAND Timebaseret вҖ” betal en fast sats pr. medarbejder pr. realtidstime. Pr. hektar вҖ” betal baseret pГҘ det bearbejdede areal.
LГҳNNIVEAU Lav = $15 pr. medarbejder pr. time Mellem = $25 pr. medarbejder pr. time HГёj = $40 pr. medarbejder pr. time
BETALINGER FratrГҰkkes hvert 5. realtidsminut, uafhГҰngigt af spillets hastighed. SatsforhГҘndsvisningen pГҘ denne side viser den prГҰcise opkrГҰvning pr. betalingsinterval.
Brug Nulstil for at gendanne alle indstillinger til standardvГҰrdierne.
